summary: Iteration 24: All tests PASSED. Tested G.Issued auto-deduction, Entry form field reorder, Error Log section. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly.

console_warnings.warning: React key warning: Encountered two children with the same key
console_warnings.priority: LOW - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

2_entry_form_field_order.description: Entry form shows: GBW Cut → P.Pkt (Plastic Bags) → P.Pkt Cut (Auto) → Mill W. QNTL (Auto)
2_entry_form_field_order.status: WORKING - Fields appear in correct order

3_g_issued_auto_creates_gunny_entry.description: Creating entry with g_issued > 0 auto-creates gunny bag 'out' entry for 'old' (market) bags
3_g_issued_auto_creates_gunny_entry.verified_behavior: Creates gunny_bags entry with bag_type='old', txn_type='out', linked_entry_id set

4_g_issued_update_entry.description: Updating entry's g_issued updates linked gunny bag entry
4_g_issued_update_entry.status: WORKING - Old gunny entry deleted and new one created with updated quantity

5_g_issued_delete_entry.description: Deleting entry removes linked gunny bag entry

6_gunny_summary_no_g_issued_key.description: /api/gunny-bags/summary does NOT return separate g_issued key

7_gunny_bags_ui_g_issued_card.description: Gunny Bags page shows 'G.Issued (Old Bags)' card instead of 'Govt Issued (g)'
7_gunny_bags_ui_g_issued_card.status: WORKING - Card shows 'G.Issued (Old Bags)' with value from old bags total_out

8_error_log_section.description: Settings page has Error Log section with Refresh Log button

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/03_entry_form_dialog.png - Entry form with field order verified
.screenshots/04_gunny_bags_tab.png - Gunny Bags tab with G.Issued (Old Bags) card
.screenshots/05_settings_tab.png - Settings page with Error Log section
.screenshots/06_settings_scrolled.png - Error Log section with Refresh button visible
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 tested 3 new features: (1) G.Issued auto-deduction - when entry has g_issued > 0, it auto-creates gunny_bags 'out' entry for 'old' bags with linked_entry_id. Update/delete propagates to linked entry. (2) Entry form field order: GBW Cut → P.Pkt → P.Pkt Cut → Mill W. QNTL confirmed correct. (3) Error Log section in Settings with Refresh button works. Gunny summary no longer has separate g_issued key - it's tracked via old.total_out.
